title: gh-pr-create — output
description: Output: identifying coordinates of the opened PR. `gh pr create` prints the PR URL on success; the workflow extracts {number, url, head_sha}. Per ADR-003 Blue invariant: load-bearing identifiers only.

url.description: the opened PR's HTML URL — what `gh pr create` echoes on stdout

number.description: the PR number (extracted from the URL tail)

head_sha.description: the commit SHA at the head of the PR's source branch
